movie.actors: Robert Patrick, Mark Dacascos, Scott Wolf, Kristina Wagner
movie.plot: Two brothers have half of a powerful ancient Chinese talisman. An evil gang leader has the other half, and determines to get the brothers' half and have a complete medallion so he can gain absolute power.
movie.title: Double Dragon
movie.writer: Paul Dini (story), Neal Shusterman (story), Michael Davis (screenplay), Peter Gould (screenplay)
